issues.description: First effect lacks condition 'If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type' — should be conditional, not unconditional. The card text uses 'If' which makes both effects conditional on leader type.
Condition type 'HasCardOnBoard' checks for card on board, but text requires leader type check. Should use 'LeaderHasType' with value 'The Seven Warlords of the Sea', not HasCardOnBoard.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [On Play] You may return 1 of your Characters to the owner's hand: If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 4 or less to the owner's hand.

condition.value: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
